nasb.text: Then Rabshakeh stood and cried with a loud voice in Judean and said, “Hear the words of the great king, the king of Assyria.

esv.text: Then the Rabshakeh stood and called out in a loud voice in the language of Judah: “Hear the words of the great king, the king of Assyria!

cnv.text: 於是拉伯沙基站著，用猶大語大聲呼喊說：“你們要聽亞述大王的話，

ccb.text: 于是，他站着用希伯来语大喊：“你们要听伟大的亚述王的话，

csbs.text: 然后，将军站着用犹太话大声呼喊，说： “你们要听亚述大王的话！
